overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy industrial dockyard in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves past freight cars and tankers, crosses a road with passing vehicles, and walks alongside a large cargo ship toward a digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock walkway between warehouse and freight yard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk between an industrial warehouse and parked freight cars

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with dark windows and corrugated metal panels
rusted brown freight containers on railway tracks
massive orange industrial gantry crane spanning across the dockyard
tall street lamps emitting warm orange light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy industrial dock walkway. To the left stands a large warehouse building while rusted freight cars sit on tracks to the right. Massive gantry cranes loom overhead in the foggy distance, casting orange glows through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor between rows of cylindrical tanker cars

events.description: entering narrow corridor flanked by cylindrical tanker cars on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage between rows of parked tanker cars

entered.detail: row of large cylindrical fuel tankers on railway tracks
row of large cylindrical fuel tankers creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow corridor between rows of massive cylindrical tanker cars. The space feels enclosed with metal walls on both sides, while the gantry cranes draw closer overhead. The rain continues to fall heavily on the asphalt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road crossing with active vehicle traffic

events.description: turning left to cross the industrial road
dark pickup truck drives past on the wet road

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the industrial road while a vehicle passes by

notable_agents.action: dark pickup truck driving along the road through the rain

entered.detail: massive yellow and blue cargo ship docked at the harbor with 'NO FUTURE' visible on the hull
industrial crane hoist hanging from the gantry structure above the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tanker corridor, the camera turns left onto a wider industrial road. A dark pickup truck passes by on the wet asphalt. The massive yellow cargo ship becomes visible on the left, docked alongside the road, while gantry cranes span overhead.

events.description: large digital billboard with 'NO FUTURE' text becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the dockside path passing the massive cargo ship on the left

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence with barbed wire running along the right side of the path
derelict car parked on the side of the walkway
large illuminated billboard displaying 'NO FUTURE' with a stylized face

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the dockside walkway alongside the massive cargo ship, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A chain-link fence runs along the right. In the distance, a large digital billboard displaying 'NO FUTURE' becomes visible through the rain and fog as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy industrial dockyard that shifts from an enclosed corridor of machinery to an open waterfront dominated by a massive cargo ship. It begins on a dock walkway between a large warehouse and rusted freight cars, with massive gantry cranes casting orange glows through the heavy fog. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor flanked by cylindrical tanker cars before opening up as the camera turns left onto a wider industrial road. A dark pickup truck passes by on the wet asphalt, revealing a massive yellow cargo ship docked to the left under the spanning cranes. The scene finally follows the dockside walkway alongside the ship's hull and a chain-link fence, approaching a large digital billboard that reads NO FUTURE through the persistent rain and fog.
